int findKthNumber(long n, int k) {
    int result = 0;
    long current = 1;
    while (k > 0) {
        int cnt = count(current, n);
        if (cnt <= k) {
            // the current subtree has less than k elements, so move to next sibling
            k -= cnt;
            current++;
        } else {
            // the k-th element is in this subtree
            k--;
            result = current;
            current *= 10;
        }
    }
    return result;
}
